description: Under the constitution written by the mythical lawgiver Lycurgus, the institution of the Agoge was established, where Spartans were trained from the age of 6 to be superior warriors in defense of the Spartan state.
tooltip: Spartiates (Champion Hoplites) are available in p1. They start as Young Hoplites (Paidiskoi) costing 80 food 40 wood 80 metal and train 20% faster than regular champs (16s.)  However, they do 20% less dmg, have -1 hack/pierce resitance and -25 health.  They promote to normal Hebontes (regular stat/cost champ spearman) and can eventually promote to Hippeis (Elite Royal Guard)
